prompt:
Please complete the following task:
Write a complete LSTM (Long Short-Term Memory) neural network for time series prediction based on PyTorch. Use 'data.csv' as the dataset for this task. Implement the actual training and prediction of the LSTM model. Use data from column "Value1" from the CSV file 'data.csv' to train the LSTM model. Then make predicions and save to 'predictions.csv' and visualize it with a image 'predictions_chart.png'.
